definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-006: No PII in event properties

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-007: Unit tests for all analytics functions

notes: PG-167: Implemented typed analytics tracking for all 6 authenticated home page sections. Created analytics.ts module with 17-member HomeAnalyticsEvent type union and 15 typed convenience functions wrapping trackEvent(). Wired analytics calls into AuthenticatedHomePage.tsx (welcome, insights, quick actions, feed, goal, pinned), InsightCard.tsx (onClick prop), DraggablePinnedItem.tsx (onItemClick prop), GoalSettingsModal.tsx (save tracking), and PinnedItemsSheet.tsx (settings save tracking). All events use home. namespace prefix with snake_case naming, category: 'home', and no PII. Documentation created at docs/analytics/home-page-tracking-plan.md and event-taxonomy.md updated.
